level_assumption: All expedition skills are treated as level 5 / max; effect text keeps the wiki's full level ladder.

skills.name: Viper Formation
skills.effect: Ahmose revives the lost art of ancient guardians. His Infantry pauses the attack once every four times, reducing damage taken by Lancers and Marksmen by 10%/15%/20%/25%/30% and Infantry by 10%/25%/40%/55%/70% for 2 turn.

skills.name: Prayer of Flame
skills.effect: Ahmose amplifies the combat spirit of friendly Infantry with the power of the Fire Crystal, increasing their damage dealt by 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% .

skills.name: Blade of Light
skills.effect: Ahmose infuses friendly Infantry's weapons with the essence of Fire Crystals, increasing his infantries' damage per attack by 12%/24%/36%/48%/60% and the target's damage taken by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Onslaught
skills.effect: Alonso attacks like the waves, granting a 40% chance of increasing all troop's Lethality by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50%

skills.name: Iron Strength
skills.effect: Alonso's indomitable will grants all troops' attack a 20% chance of reducing damage dealt by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all enemy troops for 2 turns.

skills.name: Poison Harpoon
skills.effect: Alonso coats weapons with lethal toxins, granting all troops' attack a 50% chance of dealing + 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% more damage.

skills.name: Sixth Sense
skills.effect: Bahiti's senses for dangers ahead, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: Fluorescence
skills.effect: Bahiti's battlefield instinct grants all troops' attack a 50% chance of increasing damage dealt by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Armed to the Teeth
skills.effect: Blanchette works to ensure her forces are at least as well armed as she is, increasing all Troops' Lethality by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Blood Hunter
skills.effect: Blanchette's Marksmen fire a crystal blade every 3 rounds, dealing 15%/30%/45%/60%/75% extra damage to the targets.

skills.name: Crimson Sniper
skills.effect: Thanks to Blanchette's expertise in the art of sniping and her leadership, her Marksmen deal 8%/16%/24%/32%/40% extra damage to enemy Lancers and 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% extra damage to enemy Marksmen every 2 strikes.

skills.name: Veteran's Might
skills.effect: Bradley's years of combat experience enables him to destroy enemies efficiently, increasing Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Power Shot
skills.effect: Bradley use his expertise in suppresive artillery against the ennemy vanguard, increasing Damage Dealt to Lancer by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% , and to infantry by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Tactical Assistance
skills.effect: Bradley will press every advantage against a beleaguered ennemy, increasing Damage Dealt by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for all troops for 2 turns every 4 turns.

skills.name: Smoky Encounter
skills.effect: Cara drops smoke grenades from the air, hindering enemy attacks and reducing their Lethality by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20%

skills.name: Mech Pet
skills.effect: The Mech Pets crafted by Oestermore crafters join forces with the warriors, increasing normal attack damage by 10%/15%/20%/25%/30% for all troops

skills.name: Witch's Wrath
skills.effect: Thanks to Cara's flying broom, she effortlessly bypasses the enemy infantry on the frontline. Her Marksmen deal 8%/16%/24%/32%/40% extra damage to enemy Lancers and 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% extra damage to enemy Marksmen every two attacks

skills.name: Mystic Mechanism
skills.effect: Dominic equips his troops with weapons cleverly crafted from magic props, increasing damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: Spiky Assault
skills.effect: Dominic equips his Lancers with secret deices that launch poisonous spikes, increasing their damage dealt per attack by 12%/24%/36%/48%/60% . Poisoned targets receive 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% more damage for 1 turn.

skills.name: Mirror Maze
skills.effect: Dominic disrupts enemy strategies by performing optical tricks with a mirror, reducing damage take by Infantry and Marksmen by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and increasing their damage dealt by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

skills.name: Strategic Balance
skills.effect: Mr. Tin's colossal presence automatically shields friendly ranged units, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for Marksmen, and supresses the ennemy, increasing damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for Lancers.

skills.name: Ironclad
skills.effect: Mr. Tin's metallic body functions as a fortified wall on the field, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for Infantry.

skills.name: Steel Sentinel
skills.effect: Edith's mobile defence system is reliable, increasing helth by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Scorching Sun
skills.effect: Eleonora inspires all troops with her royal aura and sense of honor, increasing their Health by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Solaris Nexus
skills.effect: Eleonora deploys a balanced formation, reducing damage taken by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% for her Infantries and increasing damage dealt by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% for her Marksmen.

skills.name: Soaring Flame
skills.effect: Eleonora strikes fear into her enemies with her fierce assaults, increasing all troops' damage dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% and reducing their damage taken by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% every 5 attacks made by Infantry for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shackling Veil Lv.5
skills.effect: Elif entangles enemy weapons with her veil, reducing all enemy Troops' Attack by 5/10/15/20/25% .

skills.name: Slash Formation Lv.5
skills.effect: Elif applies an exotic formation on the tundra, increasing Troops' Attack by 3/6/9/12/15% and Troops' Defense by 2/4/6/8/10% .

skills.name: Enchanting Tapestry Lv.5
skills.effect: Elif weaves ribbons into a curtain when her Infantry attacks, granting them a Shield with protection equal to Attack* 6/12/18/24/30% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Corrosive Color
skills.effect: Splatters paint made from mysterious crystals that corrode enemy armor, reducing the Defense of all enemy troops by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Dawn Canvas
skills.effect: Encourages troops with an inspiring painting, increasing the Attack of all allied troops by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and their Defense by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Splendid Scene
skills.effect: Boosts morale with a vibrant painting, reducing the damage taken by Infantry by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% and increasing the damage dealt by Lancers by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Pyromaniac
skills.effect: Every flame, no matter how small, can ignite a roaring fire. Flint increases his infantry's Damage Dealt by 20%/40%/60%/80%/100%

skills.name: Burning Resolve
skills.effect: Flint's fire not only dispels the cold but also ignites the passion for battle, increasing Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Immolation
skills.effect: Flint's flame of anger devours everything. Increasing all troops' Lethality by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Enmiring Vines
skills.effect: Flora litters the ground with sharp vines to hobble enemy soldiers, granting all troops a 50% chance of increasing enemies' Damage Taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Plantage
skills.effect: Flora's defensive foliage reduces Infantry Damage Taken by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% while better Adoria Rose coordination with Lancers gives joint attacks dealing 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% extra damage.

skills.name: Confusion Pollen
skills.effect: Flora's hallucinatory pollen increases enemy Infantry's Damage Taken by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% , and decreases enemy Marksmen's Damage Dealt by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for 2 turns every 4 turns.

skills.name: Hydraulic Suppression
skills.effect: Fred's water volleys destroy opponent momentum, reducing all enemy troops’ lethality by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Acidification
skills.effect: Fred coats enemy Infantry shields with a special acidic blend, amplifying their damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Floodbringer
skills.effect: A master of pressure both hydraulic and tactical, Fred's Lancers deal 40%/80%/120%/160%/200% additional damage every 4 strikes and reduce enemy troop damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% on the next turn.

skills.name: Fog of War
skills.effect: Freya lobs a smoke grenade to darken enemies' vision, reducing all enemy Troops' Attack by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Blood Moon Scythe
skills.effect: Freya reaps the fear of his enemies with her crescent-shaped weapon. After launching a normal attack, she has a 50% chance of performing Reap, dealing 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% damage.

skills.name: Night's Vengeance
skills.effect: Freya disrupts enemy attacks by launching a surprise raid and breaches enemy defense, decreasing damage taken by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and increasing damage dealt by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% for her Infantries and Marksmen.

skills.name: Golden Guard
skills.effect: Gatot commands his troops with imperial guard tactics, increasing his Infantry’s Defense by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% .

skills.name: King's Bestowal
skills.effect: The great kings blesses Gatot’s Infantry, granting Infantry a Shield with protection equal to Attack* 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% each time they attack, for 1 turn.

skills.name: Royal Legion
skills.effect: Gatot’s formidable legion instills fear in enemies, reducing their Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Alloyed Defense
skills.effect: Gisela's advanced tech increases Infantry Defense by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% .

skills.name: Scavengeworks
skills.effect: Gisela is a master of defensive scavenging. Infantry under Gisela's command have a 40% chance of increasing all Troops' Defense by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Trial Shield
skills.effect: Gisela provides an experimental version of her shield to all troops, granting a 40% chance of reducing Damage Taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all troops.

skills.name: Venom Infusion
skills.effect: Gordon dips Lancer's weapons in venom. Every 2 attacks, Lancers deals 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% extra damage and apply poison to the target for 1 turn. Posioned ennemies deals 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% less damage.

skills.name: Chemical Terror
skills.effect: Gordon's envenomed weapons terorizes the field, increasing Lancer's Damage Dealt by 30%/60%/90%/120%/150% and reducing Damage Dealt by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for all ennemy troops for 1 turn, every 3 turns.

skills.name: Toxic Release
skills.effect: Gordon generates a defensive bio-toxic fog, confusing enemy frontline Infantry, increasing their Damage Taken by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% , while blocking enemy Marksmen's line of sigth to reduce their Damage Dealt by 6%/12%/15%/24%/30% for 2 turns every 4 turns.

skills.name: Sword of Justice
skills.effect: Greg transforms our troops into a relentless sword of justice, granting a 20% chance of increasing damage dealt by 8%/16%/24%/32%/40% for all troops for 3 turns.

skills.name: Deterrence of Law
skills.effect: Greg uses the authority of the law to intimidate enemies, granting all troops' attack a 20% chance of reducing damage dealt by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all enemy troops for 2 turns.

skills.name: Law and Order
skills.effect: Greg's faith in law and order uplifts everyone, increasing Health by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Legion of the Sun
skills.effect: Gregory nurtures latent talents his troops did not realize they had, increasing Attack by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and Defense by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% for all troops.

skills.name: Charged Assault
skills.effect: Gregory inspires everyone with his valor and enthusiasm, granting all troop's normal attacks a 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% chance of dealing critical damage.

skills.name: Unbroken
skills.effect: Gregory forms unbroken defensive lines, reducing Infantry’s Damage Taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Combined Arms
skills.effect: Norah is well trained in combined arms tactics, decreasing Damage Taken by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and boosting Damage Dealt by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% for Infantry and Marksman.

skills.name: Sneak Strike
skills.effect: Norah has an eye for weaknesses, granting her Lancers a 20% chance of dealing 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% extra damage to all enemies on attack.

skills.name: Momentum
skills.effect: Norah motivates our troops, increasing all troops' Damage Dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% and reducing their damage taken by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% every 5 attack made by lancer for 2 turns.

skills.name: Roaring Rage
skills.effect: Hank's rage and the roaring of his chainsaw ignite the fighting spirit of all troops, boosting all troops' Lethality by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Flying Sparks
skills.effect: The sparks of the chainsaw ignite allied morale. For every 5 attacks Hank's Infantry perform, the damage dealt by all allied troops is increased by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% , while their damage taken is reduced by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Raging Force
skills.effect: Hank's wild attacks weaken enemy morale. Every 4 turns, the damage taken by enemy Infantry is increased by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% , while the damage dealt by enemy Marksmen is reduced by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% . This effect lasts for 2 turns.

skills.name: Survival Instincts
skills.effect: A seasoned warrior with an uncanny knack for reading the battlefield, Hector's presence has a 40% chance of reducing damage taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all troops.

skills.name: Rampant
skills.effect: Hector excels at raiding on fortified positions with well-coordinated Marksmen, increasing Infantry's Damage Dealt by 100%/125%/150%/175%/200% , and Marksman's Damage dealt by 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% , it is effective for 10 attacks, with each attack's damage boost being 85% of the previous one.

skills.name: Blitz
skills.effect: Hector has mastered the offensive strategy, granting a 25% chance of dealing 120%/140%/160%/180%/200% damage on attack.

skills.name: Worm's Ravage
skills.effect: Captain Hendrik commands a gigantic naval shipworm gnaw at the enemies’ armor reducing all enemy troops’ Defense by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Armor of Barnacles
skills.effect: Hendrik covers all friendly Troops with a layer of hard-shelled barnacles every 4 turns, increasing their Defense by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for 2 turns.

skills.name: Dragon's Heir
skills.effect: Every 3 turns, the ancient abyssal spirit’s descendants will work together with Hendrik’s Marksmen to launch an attack, dealing 8%/16%/24%/32%/40% damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Call For Blood
skills.effect: Hervor's heartfelt war cry ignites fearlessness in her soldiers, increasing all troops' Lethality by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25%

skills.name: Undying
skills.effect: The enemy menace pales beside Hervor's icy homeland, her Infantry's Damage Taken from Normal Attacks is reduced by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% and 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% from enemy skills.

skills.name: Battlethirsty
skills.effect: Hervor and her Infantry are singularly devoted to the idea of battle, reducing her Infantry's damage taken by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and increasing their damage dealt by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10%

skills.name: Tactical Genius
skills.effect: Jasser's combination of courage and wisdom enriches the army, increasing damage dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Enlightened Warfare
skills.effect: Jasser's profound knowledge increases the city's Research Speed by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% .

skills.name: Battle Manifesto
skills.effect: Jeronimo delivers a rousing rally speech ahead of the battle, increasing damage dealt by + 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Swordmentor
skills.effect: Jeronimo imparts the secrets of swordsmanship, increasing attack by + 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Expert Swordsmanship
skills.effect: Jeronimo's sword arts empower soldiers to seize battle opportunities, increasing Damage Dealt by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for all troops for 2 turns every 4 turns.

skills.name: Stand of Arms
skills.effect: Jessie implement advanced weaponry for our troops, increasing damage dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Bulwarks
skills.effect: With a keen engineering eye, Jessie enhances troops armor, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: In the Wings
skills.effect: A great offence is a great defense in the case of Karol's cavalry diversions, reducing all troops' damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Shieldbreaker
skills.effect: Karol knows exactly where enemy infantry are weakest against forces like his own, increasing all troops' Damage Dealt to Lancers by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% and 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% to Infantry.

skills.name: Standard of Ages
skills.effect: Karol has turned the lessons of past brigades into a roadmap for victory, increasing all Troops' Attack by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and Defense by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Nerf Poison
skills.effect: Ligeia unleashes a swarm of biting Mech-spiders against well-armored foes, reducing all enemy Defense by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Corrosion
skills.effect: Ligeia adds Mech-spiders to Marksmen's fire, dealing 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% extra damage every 2 attacks; spider acid dissolves enemy armor, amplifying target damage received by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Toxic Tip
skills.effect: Ligeia dips Marksmen arrowheads in spider toxin, increasing Marksmen's damage by 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% against the target every 2 attacks while reducing the target's damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Furchteinflößende Aura
skills.effect: Der vernichtende Angriff von Ling Xue hat die feindliche Formation zerstört und reduziert den feindlichen Schwadron-Angriff um 4/8/12/16/20% .

skills.name: Komplette Kontrolle
skills.effect: Die praktische, disziplinierte Anweisung von Ling Xue erhöht die Trainingsgeschwindigkeit um 4/8/12/16/20% .

skills.name: Bird Invasion
skills.effect: Lloyd summons a large number of mechanical birds to disrupt enemies, reducing their Lethality by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Iceflare Bomb
skills.effect: Lloyd prepares special bomb for all Lancers, which detonates every 3 turns, increases their attack by 30%/60%/90%/120%/150% and releases frosty mist that reduces enemy Lethality by 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Ingenious Mastery
skills.effect: Lloyd works to equips his forces with unstable by interesting creations, granting a 40% chance to increase all Troops' Lethality by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Lion's Might
skills.effect: Logan overwhelms his enemies with a fierce presence, reducing all enemy's Troops' Attack by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Lion Intimidation
skills.effect: Logan intimidates his opponent with the ferocity of a lion, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: Leader Inspiration
skills.effect: Logan inspires everyone with his inherent leadership qualities, increasing the Health by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Tactical Deception
skills.effect: With Lumak Bokan's expert guerrilla tactics, all enemy troops' damage dealt is reduced by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Emerald Warrior
skills.effect: Lumak Bokan passes his people's traditional techniques to the soldiers, increasing Hunting March Speed by 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% .

skills.name: Song of Lion
skills.effect: Lynn uplifts our troops with an enthusiastic rhythm, granting a 40% chance of increasing damage dealt by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all troops.

skills.name: Melancholic Ballad
skills.effect: Lynn demoralizes the enemies with a somber tune, reducing damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all enemy troops.

skills.name: Oonai Cadenza
skills.effect: Lynn harnesses the power of music to elevate troops morale, increasing her Marksmen's attack by 1%/2%/3%/4%/5% for every 3 attacks. Stackable and lasts until the end of the battle.

skills.name: Rapacious
skills.effect: Magnus rouses his troops with brutal intensity, boosting friendly Troop Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Iron Phalanx
skills.effect: A master of tight formations, Infantry under Magnus' command enjoy a 40% chance of gaining 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% Defense when attacking for 1 turn.

skills.name: Iceman
skills.effect: Magnus' intrepid adventuring skills provide a 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% reduction in damage versus friendly Infantry while boosting friendly Marksmen damage by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Bad Luck Streak
skills.effect: Grants all troops' attack a 50% chance of cursing the target, increasing their damage taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Lucky Charm
skills.effect: Mia brings good luck to our troops, granting all troops' attack a 50% chance of dealing 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% . more damage.

skills.name: Ritual Deciphering
skills.effect: Mia foresees potential dangers before battle, granting a 40% chance of reducing damage taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for all troops.

skills.name: Snow's Grace
skills.effect: Molly creates an avalanche that clouds enemy sights, granting a 40% chance of reducing all troops' Damage Taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50%

skills.name: Ice Dominion
skills.effect: Molly excels in snowy terrains, granting all troops' attack a 50% chance of increasing damage dealt by + 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Youthful Rage
skills.effect: Hell hath no fury like an angry Molly. Increasing damage dealt by + 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% damage.

skills.name: Feral Protection
skills.effect: Natalia Commands the beasts to cover your troops, granting a 40% chance of reducing all troops' Damage Taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50%

skills.name: Queen of the Wild
skills.effect: Natalia is a natural leader, increasing Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Call of the Wild
skills.effect: Natalia's unexplained connection with nature allows her to rally wild beast, increasing damage dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Armes Combinées
skills.effect: Norah est bien entraînée à la tactique des armes combinées, réduisant les dégâts reçus de 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% et boostant les dégâts infligés par l'Infanterie et les Tireurs de 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

skills.name: Frappe Furtive
skills.effect: Norah a l'œil pour repérer les faiblesses, ce qui donne 20 % de chances à ses Lanciers d'infliger 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% de dégâts supplémentaires à tous les ennemis lors d'une attaque.

skills.name: Elan
skills.effect: Nora motive ses troupes, augmentant les dégâts infligés par toutes les troupes de 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% , et réduisant les dégâts reçus de 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% toutes les 5 attaques des lanciers pendant 2 tours.

skills.name: Super Nutrients
skills.effect: Patrick's culinary masterpieces invigorate our troops, increasing Health by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Caloric Booster
skills.effect: Patrick's gourmet meals motivate and unleash the potential of our soldiers, increasing Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.

skills.name: Vigor Tactics
skills.effect: Philly's secret remedy strengthens the soldiers, increasing Attack by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and Defense by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% for all troops.

skills.name: Dosage Boost
skills.effect: Philly's uses her secret tonic to enhance the warriors' strength, granting all troops' attack a 25% chance of dealing + 120%/140%/160%/180%/200% damage.

skills.name: Energizing Shot
skills.effect: Phillys special shot improves troops focus, granting a 40% chance of reducing all troops Damage Taken by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Assassin's Instinct
skills.effect: Reina targets enemy weak spots, increasing normal attack damage by 10%/15%/20%/25%/30% for all troops.

skills.name: Swift Jive
skills.effect: Reina's adept leadership grants all troops a 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% chance of dodging normal attacks.

skills.name: Shadow Blade
skills.effect: With Reina's clever tactics, her lancers have a 25% chance of performing an extra attack, dealing 120%/140%/160%/180%/200% damage.

skills.name: Nightmare Trace
skills.effect: Renee always fights in unbelievable ways. The troops she commands can place Dream Marks on their targets every two turns, dealing extra 40%/80%/120%/160%/200% Lancer Damage once next turn. The Dream Marks last for 1 turns.

skills.name: Dreamcatcher
skills.effect: Renee's Dreams Marks highilght ennemy vulnerabilities, incresing her Lancer's damage dealt to marked targets by 30%/60%/90%/120%/150% .

skills.name: Dreamslice
skills.effect: Renee's Dream Marks expose ennemy weaknesses, increasing damage dealt to marked targets by 15%/30%/45%/60%/75% for all troops.

skills.name: Inferno Regiment
skills.effect: Rufus uses his bold leadership to transform all troops into blazing flames on the battlefield, increasing their Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Armor Crush
skills.effect: Rufus equips his Marksmen with armor-piercing rounds, dealing 12%/24%/36%/48%/60% extra damage for each attack and increases the target's damage taken by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Wrathful Quake
skills.effect: Rufus' aggressive combat style grants all troops a 20% chance to intimidate enemies, reducing their Lethality by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% for 2 turns.

skills.name: Rallying Beat
skills.effect: Seo-yoon beats the war drum to boost morale, increasing Troops Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Soothing Dance
skills.effect: Seo-yoon treats wounded troops with traditional medicine, increasing Healing speed in the infirmary by 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% .

skills.name: Defenders' Edge
skills.effect: Sergey's guards our troops with his shield, reducing damage taken by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: Weaken
skills.effect: Sergey's intimidating presence reduces Attack by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all enemy troops.

skills.name: Treasure Hunter
skills.effect: “Everyone has a share when the legendary ocean treasure is found!” Sonya’s promise inspires everyone, increasing Damage by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% for all troops.

skills.name: Bounty Temptation
skills.effect: Sonya motivates her Troops with bounty, making her Lancers deal 15%/30%/45%/60%/75% more damage every 2 attacks and increasing Attack by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops for 1 turn.

skills.name: Torrential Impact
skills.effect: Sonya’s Lancers will seize every chance to launch a surprise raid like underwater currents. Her Lancers deal 50%/100%/150%/200%/250% damage every 5 turns and stun the target for 1 turn.

skills.name: Nightfall Legion
skills.effect: Applies the Night Guard's tactics on the battlefield, increasing the Attack of all allied troops by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Shadow World
skills.effect: Viveca's Marksmen gain tremendous insight from their battles against darkness, allowing them to pinpoint enemy weaknesses. Attacks have a 20% chance to deal 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% extra damage to all enemy troops.

skills.name: Children of the Mist
skills.effect: The formations and tactics of the Night's Guard provide balanced offense and defense, reducing damage taken by allied Infantry by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% . and increasing damage dealt by allied Marksmen by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Raging Storm
skills.effect: Vulcanus is skilled in the arts of terror and manipulation, reducing all enemy troops' Attack by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Breaker Steel
skills.effect: There's no steel like the blades in Vulcanus' armory, empowering all troops to deal 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% extra damage after every 5 attacks, and increasing damage taken for the target by 5%/7.5%/10%/12.5%/15% in the next attack.

skills.name: True Strike
skills.effect: Vulcanus' modified armor-piercing arrows reduce enemy Infantry and Lancer Defense by 12%/24%/36%/48%/60% for 3 turns and increase our Marksmen's Attack by 12%/24%/36%/48%/60% for 1 turn.

skills.name: Thunder Strike
skills.effect: Wayne's brilliant battle planning allows all troops to launch an extra attack every 4 turns, dealing 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% damage.

skills.name: Roundabout Hit
skills.effect: Wayne's stratagems can pierce the thickest of defense. On every other attack, his Marksmen deal 8%/16%/24%/32%/40% extra damage to enemy Lancer and 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% extra damage to enemy Marksmen.

skills.name: Fleet
skills.effect: Wayne ensure no misstep goes unpunished with an eagle's eye for weakness, granting all troop's attacks a 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% Crit Rate.

skills.name: Shadow's Evasion
skills.effect: Wu Ming moves like a shadow, dodging and coutering ennemies, reducing his troops' damage taken from normal attacks by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% and from skills by 6%/12%/18%/34%/30% .

skills.name: Crescent Uplift
skills.effect: Wu Ming spreads his wisdom and techniques, increasing friendly troops' damage dealt by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Elemental Resonance
skills.effect: Wu Ming leads everyone to a heightened affinity with their combat techniques, incresaing troops' skill damage dealt by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% .

skills.name: Fungal Fog
skills.effect: Xura releases an underground fungi that quickly multiplies to block enemy vision, reducing damage dealt to friendly troops by 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% .

skills.name: Piercing Arrow
skills.effect: Being able to identify the weak spots in the enemy's armor, Xura's Marksmen deal 20%/40%/60%/80%/100% additional damage every 2 strikes and make their target take 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% more damage for 1 turn.

skills.name: Unorthodoxy
skills.effect: Xura's unorthodox tactics are quite disruptive, increasing Marksmen’s damage dealt by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% while reducing their damage taken by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Implacable
skills.effect: Zinman the master builder understands what is required of a strong defensive line, increasing all troops' Defense by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% and Health by 2%/4%/6%/8%/10% .

skills.name: Bastionist
skills.effect: Zinman's skillful control of the construction workflow reduces basic resource consumption (Meat, Wood, Coal, Iron) by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% and increases Building Upgrade speed by 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

skills.name: Positional Battler
skills.effect: Zinman masterfully manipulates the battlefield, increasing Lethality by 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% for all troops.
